blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
